_about: Daily-cached snapshot of public.projects. Written by kb/_load_projects.py after a successful Supabase fetch. Falls back to this file on Supabase outage so the dashboard regen continues without manual intervention.

rows.name: MAP Platform Development
rows.description: Add and refine MAP features to support student-centered CPL, enhance user experience, security, and functionality to create and maintain a one-stop CPL infrastructure for the system.
rows.milestones: April 2026: MAP Exhibit module launch; May 2026: Student CPL Portal production release
rows.latest_update: 50+ dev tickets completed; 8 feature areas advanced; Student Portal in final dev sprint; accessibility standards implemented
rows.kpi_unit: Cumulative MAP features added and significantly enhanced
rows.wp_notes: Progress made across eight feature areas with 50+ development tickets completed. Key enhancements include Student Portal, AI-assisted JST parsing, credential matching, and dashboard improvements.

rows.name: System Integration & Interoperability
rows.description: Related systems feature integrated, interoperable, and AI-Assisted CPL to support student access, planning, completion, transfer, tracking and research.
rows.milestones: 2026: CTDL tagging for skills and certifications; 2027: Full registry launch
rows.latest_update: Credential Engine integration established; competency-level alignment with CTDL underway; Phase 1 Program Pathways Mapper integration complete; CVC integration underway; Career Passport integration planned
rows.wp_notes: Credential Engine integration established supporting competency-level alignment with CTDL. Interoperability with eTranscript, Career Passport, and CCCApply is in planning/development phases.

rows.name: CPL Student Portal
rows.description: Deploy a statewide AI-enabled portal for students to search, match, document, and request CPL.
rows.milestones: May 2026: Phase 1 production release; Dec 2026: Phase 2 with Program Pathways Mapper, CVC, resume builder
rows.latest_update: Full AI-enabled Student Portal in final development sprint; landing page and JST upload tools live
rows.wp_notes: Full AI-enabled Student Portal scheduled for May 2026 production release. Phase 2 (Dec 2026) will integrate Program Pathways Mapper, CVC course search, and resume builder.

rows.name: California Credential Registry
rows.description: CPL-qualified credentials are hosted on the credential registry.
rows.milestones: 2026: Standardized credential data schema with TOP/CIP codes; 2026-27: Registry launch
rows.latest_update: No credentials published yet; full launch not targeted until 2026-27; schema development underway
rows.wp_notes: No credentials published in registry this period. Full launch not targeted until 2026-27. Standardized credential data schema incorporating TOP and CIP codes is in preparation for the registry pipeline.

rows.name: Statewide Credit Recommendations
rows.description: Create and adopt statewide CPL credit recommendations through ASCCC faculty workgroups.
rows.milestones: June 2026: 650+ cumulative adopted recommendations; 2030: 1,000 target
rows.latest_update: 288 cumulative credit recommendations; 281 adopted this year; 230 in progress through adoption workflow
rows.wp_notes: 288 cumulative statewide credit recommendations with 281 adopted this academic year. 230 currently in progress through college review and adoption workflows. Spanning military, apprenticeship, industry certification, and professional licensure fields.

rows.name: Faculty Discipline Workgroups
rows.description: Faculty and industry workgroups are convened to make statewide credit recommendations.
rows.milestones: 2025-26: 11 of 25 workgroups active; June 2026: Additional disciplines onboarded
rows.latest_update: 11 workgroups convened spanning high-demand fields; 101 credential exhibits documented
rows.wp_notes: 11 of 25 target statewide faculty workgroups convened, recommending CPL for credentials and military training across high-demand disciplines. 40 disciplines planned by 2030.

rows.name: Common Course Crosswalks
rows.description: Develop AI-enabled faculty-validated CPL common course crosswalks.
rows.milestones: April 2026: MAP Exhibit module (dependency); June 2026: 20+ validated crosswalks
rows.latest_update: Common Course Crosswalk functionality is built into the next release of the revised MAP Exhibit module April release
rows.wp_notes: No validated crosswalks completed yet. Development underway via three parallel approaches (Electrical, Carpentry Apprenticeship, and AI-assisted). Dependent on MAP Exhibit module releasing April 2026.

rows.name: Validated Skills
rows.description: CPL-eligible credentials will include faculty-validated skills, which are ported to eTranscript and/or Career Passport.
rows.milestones: April 2026: MAP Exhibit module enables functionality; 2030: 250 descriptors target
rows.latest_update: Functionality dependent on MAP Exhibit module; development underway
rows.wp_notes: Functionality enabling creation of common course crosswalks is a component of the MAP Exhibit module scheduled for April 2026. Development underway but dependent on that release.

rows.name: CPL Offers & Awards Tracking — All Populations
rows.description: Expand equitable CPL access to 250,000 Californians (cumulative all populations), including military, working adults, apprentices, and all those with prior learning.
rows.latest_update: Cumulative students served with CPL exceeded 2025-26 annual target
rows.kpi_unit: cumulative Californians served with CPL awards
rows.wp_notes: 43630 cumulative students offered some form of CPL as of 4/7/2026 per the CPL Dashboard. Exceeds the 2025-26 annual target of 40,000.

rows.name: CPL Offers & Awards Tracking — Working Adults
rows.description: Of the 250,000, expand equitable CPL access to 160,000 cumulative working adults and others with prior learning by 2030.
rows.latest_update: Cumulative working adults and other students served with CPL exceeded 2025-26 annual target
rows.kpi_unit: cumulative working adults and others served with CPL
rows.wp_notes: 22149 cumulative working adults and others offered some form of CPL as of 4/7/2026 per the CPL Dashboard. Exceeds the 2025-26 annual target of 95,000.

rows.name: CPL Offers & Awards Tracking — Veterans & Service Members
rows.description: Of the 250,000, expand equitable CPL access to 70,000 cumulative veterans and service members by 2030.
rows.latest_update: Cumulative veterans and service members served with CPL exceeded 2025-26 annual target
rows.kpi_unit: cumulative veterans and service members served with CPL
rows.wp_notes: 21552 cumulative veterans and service members offered some form of CPL as of 4/7/2026 per the CPL Dashboard. Short of the ambitious Veteran Sprint Goal of 30,000 but on track to achieve the target by June 30, 2026.

rows.name: CPL Offers & Awards Tracking — Apprentice Cohort
rows.description: Of the 250,000, expand equitable CPL access to 20,000 cumulative apprentices and journey workers by 2030.
rows.latest_update: Cumulative apprentices and journey workers served with CPL awards exceeded 2025-26 annual target
rows.kpi_unit: cumulative apprentices and journey workers served with CPL
rows.wp_notes: 700 cumulative apprentices and journey workers offered some form of CPL as of 4/7/2026 per the CPL Dashboard. Exceeds the 2025-26 annual target of 500.

rows.name: CPL Units Transcription
rows.description: Ensure CPL units are accurately reflected on student records
rows.milestones: 2025-26 target: 85,000 (exceeded at 96,449); training on transcription procedures ongoing
rows.latest_update: Cumulative transcripted CPL units exceeds 2025-26 annual target of 85,000
rows.wp_notes: 96,449 transcripted CPL units recorded. Exceeds the 2025-26 annual target of 85,000. Includes military (12,000), non-military (82,000), and apprentice (6,000) units.

rows.name: Institutional Participation
rows.description: Colleges. IHLs, and agencies throughout the system and state actively use the MAP CPL infrastructure to offer, document and award CPL.
rows.milestones: 2025-26 target: 50 colleges active (exceeded at 84); 114 colleges funded; 53 at implementation stage
rows.latest_update: Cumulative institutions meet active threshold; 114 received $50K grants; 53 at implementation stage, 13 showing growth
rows.wp_notes: 84 colleges meet the active threshold (10+ students and 5+ articulations). 114 of 115 credit colleges and 4 noncredit campuses received $50,000 CPL implementation funding. 53 at implementation stage, 13 showing growth.

rows.name: Student Impact Rate Survey
rows.description: Deploy CPL student impact survey tool within Student Portal to measure career and educational outcomes
rows.milestones: April 2026: Survey tool embedded in Student Portal launch
rows.latest_update: Survey tool not yet deployed; infrastructure under development; will launch with Student Portal
rows.wp_notes: Survey tool is not yet deployed. Data collection infrastructure is still under development. The CPL Student Portal launching April 2026 will include the embedded student impact survey for first-ever systematic collection.

rows.name: Student Stories
rows.description: Publish CPL student stories on MAP website; develop AI-assisted story capture tool
rows.milestones: June 2026: AI-assisted story capture tool production release; target: 50 published stories
rows.latest_update: Cumulative student stories published on My CPL Story and MAP AI-assisted capture tool--in development
rows.wp_notes: 32 student stories published on the My CPL Story section of the MAP website. AI-assisted student story capture tool is in development for June 2026 production release.

rows.name: College Tracking & Recognition
rows.description: Colleges, personnel, and agencies are recognized for contributions and progress toward increasing equitable access thrugh CPL.
rows.milestones: Annual recognition cycle; CPL Dashboard enhancements ongoing
rows.latest_update: Three MAP College of Year awards given (2023-2025); CPL Dashboard live with public data
rows.kpi_unit: colleges, agencies, and personnel recognized for contributions and progress
rows.wp_notes: 3 institutions recognized as MAP College of the Year: 2023 Moreno Valley College, 2024 San Bernardino Valley College, 2025 Miramar College. CPL Dashboard provides public tracking and recognition data.

rows.name: Sprints and Projects
rows.description: CPL sprints, pilot projects, CPL outreach, and demonstration projects are supported with new CPL opportunities and resources.
rows.milestones: Goal 1: 100 colleges upload 5+ JSTs (78 of 100); Goal 2: 75 colleges award basic training credit; Goal 3: 58 colleges with articulated ACE recs
rows.latest_update: 3 Sprints underway: Veteran, Apprenticeship, and Statewide Adoptions; 1 new Military Base demonstration project underway;  and several projects underway.
rows.wp_notes: Veteran Sprint: 20,991 JSTs uploaded (62% of ~34,000 target). 75 colleges awarding basic training credit (up from ~15% baseline). 679 unique ACE credit recommendations covered. $163M estimated savings.

rows.name: Veteran Sprint
rows.description: Ensure all 34,000+ enrolled CCC veterans have JSTs processed in MAP; 3 goals: JST upload, basic training credit, systemwide articulation, military base demonstration project
rows.milestones: Goal 1: 100 colleges upload 5+ JSTs (78 of 100); Goal 2: 75 colleges award basic training credit; Goal 3: 58 colleges with articulated ACE recs
rows.latest_update: 20,991 JSTs uploaded (62%); 75 colleges awarding basic training credit; 679 unique ACE credit recs; $163M est. saving; CCCApply JST authorization process.
rows.kpi_unit: Count of sprint goal progress achieved
rows.wp_notes: Veteran Sprint: 20,991 JSTs uploaded (62% of ~34,000 target). 75 colleges awarding basic training credit (up from ~15% baseline). 679 unique ACE credit recommendations covered. $163M estimated savings.

rows.name: Apprenticeship Sprint
rows.description: Document every recent/current CCC apprentice by trade, union, CPL awarded, program, and workforce region
rows.team: DAS, Cal-JAC, LAUNCH Network, Trade Partners
rows.milestones: Spring 2026: ~1,000 LAUNCH Network apprenticeship records uploaded; DAS data integration for 30,000+ records
rows.latest_update: 678 apprentice students documented; 6,000 units; DAS partnership active; Cal-JAC early partner for 14,000 first responders
rows.kpi_unit: Count of sprint goal progress achieved
rows.wp_notes: Apprenticeship Sprint: 678 apprentice students documented with 6,000 CPL units. DAS partnership active. Cal-JAC early partner for 14,000 first responder trainees. ~1,000 LAUNCH Network records expected Spring 2026.

rows.name: Statewide Adoption Sprint
rows.description: Accelerate CPL adoption across colleges statewide through targeted outreach, implementation grants, and technical assistance
rows.milestones: 2025-26: $50K distributed to 114 colleges; track accountability data for CO reporting
rows.latest_update: 114 of 115 colleges funded; 84 meet active participation threshold; 96 showing some engagement
rows.kpi_unit: Count of sprint goal progress achieved
rows.wp_notes: Statewide Adoption Sprint: 114 of 115 credit colleges plus 4 noncredit campuses received $50K CPL implementation grants. 84 meet active participation threshold. 96 showing some engagement level.

rows.name: 29 Palms Marine Corps Base Demo
rows.description: Partnership with Twentynine Palms MCAGCC + Copper Mountain College; develop CPL pathways for 42 MOS trained at base
rows.team: Copper Mountain College, Cal VET, MCAGCC Education Center
rows.milestones: July 2026: Initial outcomes; March 2027: Scalable model for replication across 34 CA military bases
rows.latest_update: New demonstration project launched; coordinated outreach with Cal VET and military education center underway
rows.wp_notes: 29 Palms Demo: New demonstration project launched. Developing CPL pathways for 42 Military Occupational Specialties (MOS) trained at MCAGCC. Coordinated outreach with Cal VET and military education center underway.

rows.name: Strategic Partnerships
rows.description: Build and maintain partnerships with industry, state agencies, labor unions, and education segments
rows.team: DAS, CDE, ASCCC, LWDA, Credential Engine, WestEd, Cal-JAC, CCCF
rows.milestones: 20+ partners active; expand to include Futuro Health, Iron Workers, Public Works Alliance EMS Corps
rows.latest_update: 20+ partners actively engaged including DAS, CDE, ASCCC, Credential Engine, WestEd, Cal-JAC, and others
rows.wp_notes: 20+ partners actively working with the CPL Initiative including DAS, CDE, ASCCC, Credential Engine, WestEd, Cal-JAC, CCCF, Futuro Health, Public Works Alliance EMS Corps, and Iron Workers union.

rows.name: Technical Assistance & Training
rows.description: Deliver local, regional, and statewide CPL training; 25+ events reaching 1,000+ participants
rows.team: CCCF, MAP Training Team, Regional Consortia
rows.milestones: 2025-26: Remaining regional workshops; focus on newly-funded colleges
rows.latest_update: 25 trainings delivered incl. 6th Annual CPL Summit and 4 Regional Trainings; 1,000+ staff/faculty/admins trained
rows.wp_notes: 25 trainings delivered including the 6th Annual CPL Summit and 4 CPL Regional Training Workshops. Over 1,000 staff, faculty, and administrators trained. Individual technical assistance and office hours ongoing.

rows.name: Law & Regulation Review
rows.description: Advance improvements to laws, regulations, procedures, and constituent resolutions focused on removing CPL barriers are enacted
rows.milestones: 2026 session: Advocate for $2M ongoing + $35M one-time; advance SCFF integration
rows.latest_update: AB 123 chaptered ($5M ongoing + $15M one-time); Title 5 updates advanced; $2M + $35M proposed in Governor's 2026 budget
rows.wp_notes: AB 123 chaptered establishing first-ever ongoing CPL state funding ($5M ongoing + $15M one-time). Title 5 regulatory updates advanced to reduce residency and access barriers. Draft trailer bill for additional $2M ongoing + $35M one-time under review.

rows.name: Sustainable Funding
rows.description: Advance improvements in sustainable funding models and development of external funding to support ongoing CPL work.
rows.milestones: 2026-27: $24.7M budgeted (if proposed funds approved); 2029-30: $9.1M; Total: $89M
rows.latest_update: $50K distributed to 114 colleges; $6M one-time fully allocated; 2026 advocacy for $2M ongoing + $35M one-time
rows.wp_notes: $50,000 distributed to 114 of 115 credit colleges and 4 noncredit campuses for CPL implementation. $6M one-time fully allocated. 2026 advocacy active for $2M ongoing + $35M one-time appropriation.

rows.name: AI-Ready California Demonstration
rows.description: $7M two-year project: CPL-embedded AI workforce pathway from HS dual enrollment through AS to BAS-ASIO baccalaureate across 4 districts
rows.team: RCCD, SDCCD, LACCD, SBCCD; ASCCC CIS Workgroup
rows.milestones: Fall 2025: MOUs and staffing; Spring 2026: AI cert CPL recs drafted; Fall 2026: Dual enrollment launch at 8+ HS
rows.latest_update: Project proposal developed; 4 demo districts identified; BAS-ASIO curriculum in design; contingent on funding
rows.wp_notes: AI-Ready California: Proposed $7M two-year demonstration. 4 demo districts identified (RCCD, SDCCD, LACCD, SBCCD). BAS-ASIO curriculum in design. Contingent on funding approval.

rows.name: AI Certification-to-Course Matching
rows.description: AI-assisted matching of 117 industry certifications to CCC courses across priority sectors; Phase 2 beta expanding pool
rows.milestones: Phase 1 complete: 117 certs covered; June 2026: Phase 2 production release expanding cert pool
rows.latest_update: Phase 1 complete covering 117 industry certifications in priority sectors; Phase 2 beta underway
rows.wp_notes: AI cert-to-course matching Phase 1 complete covering 117 industry certifications in priority sectors. Phase 2 beta expanding certification pool. Production release planned June 2026.

rows.name: AI Apprenticeship CPL Tools
rows.description: AI tools for apprenticeship/journey worker CPL, degree-progress reports, and outreach; pilot with construction/electrician trades
rows.budget_source: MAP Addendum - N2N Lightleap AI + $54,764 pilot
rows.team: Santiago Canyon College, Norco College, Trade Partners
rows.milestones: Phase 1: Construction and electrician trades at SCC and Norco; Phase 2: Scale statewide with trade partners
rows.latest_update: Phase 1 in progress; proof-of-concept pilot funded ($54,764); $1.35M project funding from $6M appropriation
rows.wp_notes: AI apprenticeship CPL tools Phase 1 in progress with construction and electrician trades at Santiago Canyon College and Norco College. Proof-of-concept pilot funded ($54,764). Phase 2 will scale statewide.

rows.name: RP Group CPL Field Survey
rows.description: Systemwide CPL implementation survey across all California community colleges
rows.milestones: Completed 2025
rows.latest_update: Survey completed; results informing implementation strategy and targeted assistance
rows.wp_notes: Systemwide CPL implementation survey completed 2025. Results informing implementation strategy and targeted assistance.

rows.name: VRC CPL Module Revision
rows.description: Rewrite and expand Virtual Resource Center CPL training modules with CCCF/Success Center
rows.team: Foundation CCC Success Center, MAP Training Team
rows.milestones: Feb-Apr 2026: Content development; May-Jun: Revisions and final packaging
rows.latest_update: Review and gap analysis complete; content development phase underway
rows.wp_notes: VRC CPL Module revision: Review and gap analysis complete. Content development phase underway. Final packaging targeted May-June 2026.

rows.name: WestEd CPL Scope of Work
rows.description: Skills taxonomy, credential cataloguing, NFN pilot, student experience mapping, system design, and credential registry expansion planning
rows.team: WestEd Team, NFN Colleges, MAP Team
rows.milestones: 6 workstreams: Credential ID, Course Alignment, NFN Use Case, Student Experience, System Design, Strategic Planning
rows.latest_update: Skills taxonomy/CTDL work progressing; PlayLab AI Bot for skillifying coursework; NFN pilot site outreach underway
rows.wp_notes: WestEd CPL Scope of Work: 6 workstreams active (Credential ID, Course Alignment, NFN Use Case, Student Experience, System Design, Strategic Planning). Skills taxonomy/CTDL work progressing.

rows.name: MIS Data Reconciliation
rows.description: Align MAP and MIS CPL data for consistent systemwide reporting; target full alignment by 2027
rows.team: College IR Staff, CO Data Team
rows.milestones: End of 2026: MIS and MAP reconciliation procedures and tools released
rows.latest_update: MIS Data Element Dictionary SY domain revised; training sessions held; Common Cloud integration planned
rows.wp_notes: MIS and MAP reconciliation procedures and tools to support data integrity and interoperability, scheduled for release at end of 2026. MIS Data Element Dictionary SY domain was revised this academic year.

rows.name: CPL Legislative Advocacy (2026 Session)
rows.description: Advocate for $2M additional ongoing + $35M one-time CPL funding in 2026 legislative session
rows.milestones: Governor's 2026 budget includes proposed $2M ongoing + $35M one-time; legislative session through September
rows.latest_update: Proposed funding in Governor's budget; monitoring and providing evidence to support advancement
rows.wp_notes: Governor's 2026 budget includes proposed $2M ongoing + $35M one-time. Legislative session runs through September 2026. Monitoring and providing evidence to support advancement.
